overall_status: PARTIAL CLINICAL-PROGRAMME CLOSURE — PHASE 3 CAGRISEMA EVIDENCE AND CURRENT US REGULATORY REVIEW IDENTIFIED; CS10 COMPONENT, FORMULATION AND PRODUCT EQUIVALENCE OPEN
